lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner, preloaded for this ship.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Ship slot layout, module variants, and engineering blueprint data.

sources.label: Inara — Corsair
sources.what: Stock hull stats, hardpoint/internal layout, and module sellers for this ship.

sources.label: Fandom — Corsair
sources.what: Manufacturer (Gutamaya), multirole role assessment, and release history.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Corsair ship page — manufacturer specs, feature overview, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: YouTube — Ricardos Gaming
sources.what: Assesses the Gutamaya Corsair's combat and multirole performance against rival medium hulls.

sources.label: YouTube — TheYamiks
sources.what: Opinionated review of the Corsair as a medium combat platform, weighing its strengths and weaknesses.

sources.label: YouTube — Ricardos Gaming
sources.what: Critical take on the Corsair's limits: no huge hardpoint, no fighter bay, no military slots.
